chunks.title: About Me
chunks.content: I am Awais Ur Rehman, a passionate Software Engineer, Full Stack Developer, and Product Innovator. With experience in startups, enterprises, and freelancing since 2017, I specialize in building cross-platform applications, AI-powered solutions, and scalable software for real-world businesses.

chunks.title: Skills & Tools
chunks.content: Programming: Java, Python, JavaScript, Dart. Web: Next.js, Tailwind CSS, Bootstrap. Mobile: Flutter, React Native. Backend & Databases: MongoDB, MySQL, Firebase. Tools: Docker, Docker Compose, AWS, Git, Figma, VS Code, Android Studio, REST APIs.

chunks.title: Projects Portfolio
chunks.content: SANHA Pakistan — Halaal Certification Platform: modern certification and verification platform (https://www.sanha.org.pk/). OculaCare: 360° holistic eye healthcare solution (LinkedIn project link). ODIN — Social Listening Platform: real-time tracking & sentiment analysis for HBL (https://odin.hbl.com/). Alara — Customer Analytics & Workflow Platform: analytics for FBL & BAFL (https://alara.faysalbank.com/). OxyBlue: water delivery app with tracking & scheduling (LinkedIn project link). Otaku: Flutter anime tracking app (LinkedIn project link).

chunks.title: Work Experience
chunks.content: Senior Fullstack Developer — ISSM Labelling Solutions (2025–Present). Chief Product Officer — Ceven Technologies (2024–Present). Full Stack Developer — Freelance (2017–Present). Frontend Developer — Urban Codez (2023).

chunks.title: Education
chunks.content: Bachelors in Software Engineering — COMSATS University, Islamabad (2021–2025). FSc — Government College University, Lahore (2016–2018).

chunks.title: Certificates & Awards
chunks.content: Flutter Kahoot — Winner. Syberkoza — 1st Position. PSYWSC — Volunteer. AI Challenge 2024 (Securiti.ai) — 2nd Position & Best Presentation Award. COMSATS Industrial Expo 2024 — 1st Position.

chunks.title: Blog Posts
chunks.content: Why I Started My Own App Agency. Lessons from Building Scalable Mobile and Web Apps. The Future of Cross-Platform Development. My Experience with AI-Powered App Development.

chunks.title: Contact & Social
chunks.content: Email: awaisjarral37@gmail.com. Phone: +92 344 5123196. Portfolio: https://awais-ur-rehman-personal-website.vercel.app/. GitHub: https://github.com/awais-ur-rehman. LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/awais-ur-rehman-88615a217/. Instagram: https://instagram.com/_awais._.jarral_/.

chunks.title: Bot Response Guidelines
chunks.content: Tone: professional, confident, approachable. Style: clear, concise, bullet points. Provide links when possible. Adapt to context — direct for facts, detailed for projects/experience.

chunks.title: Roles & Fit (Recruiter)
chunks.content: Target roles: Full Stack Developer, Frontend Engineer (React/Next.js), Mobile Engineer (Flutter), Product-minded Engineer. Strengths: delivering UX-focused, scalable apps; rapid prototyping; collaborating with product/design; owning features end-to-end.

chunks.title: Core Skills Summary (Recruiter)
chunks.content: Frontend: React, Next.js, Tailwind CSS. Mobile: Flutter, React Native. Backend: Node/REST, Firebase; experience with Python/Java services. Databases: MongoDB, MySQL, Firebase. DevOps: Docker, Docker Compose, AWS (CloudFront, S3, ECS/Fargate, RDS/DynamoDB). Practices: CI/CD, testing, code review, observability.

chunks.title: Experience Summary (Recruiter)
chunks.content: 8+ years including freelance (since 2017), product leadership (CPO at Ceven Technologies), and engineering roles (Frontend/Fullstack). Industries: Healthtech (OculaCare), Fintech/Analytics (ODIN, Alara), Certification (SANHA), Consumer apps (OxyBlue, Otaku).

chunks.title: Location & Availability (Recruiter)
chunks.content: Location: Pakistan (PKT, UTC+5). Work: remote-first; open to contract or full-time. Collaboration: comfortable with async workflows and overlapping hours with EU/US teams when required.

chunks.title: Project Highlights (Recruiter)
chunks.content: OculaCare: mobile-first healthcare flows, secure data, smooth media; OxyBlue: real-time order tracking, scheduled deliveries; ODIN (HBL): social listening and sentiment analysis platform; Alara (Faysal/BAFL): customer analytics + workflow automation; SANHA: certification and verification portal. Focus: performance, reliability, and clear UX.

chunks.title: Process & Quality (Recruiter)
chunks.content: Approach: requirement clarifying, rapid prototypes, iterate with users, production-readiness. Quality: TypeScript, linting, tests (unit/integration/E2E where needed), CI/CD, code reviews, monitoring and logs. Security: key/secret hygiene, least-privilege IAM, input validation.

chunks.title: Preferred Stack (Recruiter)
chunks.content: Web: Next.js (App Router), React Server Components, Tailwind CSS, Motion. Mobile: Flutter for consistent UI and performance; React Native when sharing TS domain makes sense. Backend: Next.js server routes/Firebase; Python/Node services. Infra: Docker/Compose locally, AWS for prod.

chunks.title: Communication & Collaboration (Recruiter)
chunks.content: Strong written communication; concise progress updates; async-first. Cross-functional collaboration with design/product/QA. Comfortable leading feature squads and mentoring juniors.

chunks.title: Call to Action (Recruiter)
chunks.content: For roles or collaborations, reach out via LinkedIn (https://www.linkedin.com/in/awais-ur-rehman-88615a217/) or email (mailto:awaisjarral37@gmail.com). Portfolio: https://awais-ur-rehman-personal-website.vercel.app/
